subcodes.first_line: In this day the Call of the Dawning-Place of the Self-Subsisting hath been raised up, and likewise the clamor of the people of idle fancies. With utmost endeavor must ye arise to serve the Cause [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز ندای مطلع قیوم مرتفع و همچنین ضوضاء اهل ظنون باید بکمال همت در خدمت امر
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @Satan; the Evil One
